tests.test_name: Gap Analysis sections do not appear when add-on is not selected
tests.journey: A Product Owner uploads a BDD feature file and runs documentation without the Gap Analysis add-on, verifying that Coverage Gaps and Robustness Gaps sections are absent from the output.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Gap Analysis sections do not appear when add-on is not selected
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: Analysis API is mocked and user is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User selects format 'bdd' and role 'Product Owner', uploads 'bdd_sample.feature', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Documentation appears in the output panel but 'Coverage Gaps' and 'Robustness Gaps' sections are not present

tests.journey: A QA Manager uploads a BDD feature file and runs documentation without the Technical Review add-on, verifying that Technical Quality and Maintainability Risks sections are absent from the output.
